project_name: The Loneliness Economy: The Price of Isolation

scenes.text: Loneliness is no longer just a feeling; it is a booming global industry.
scenes.bg_prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a crowded city street where every person is looking down at a glowing phone, dusk lighting

scenes.text: We are living in the Age of Connectivity, yet we are fundamentally alone.
scenes.bg_prompt: An empty modern apartment with one single chair facing a window overlooking a digital metropolis, minimalist style

scenes.text: As traditional social structures dissolve, a new economy is rising to replace them.
scenes.bg_prompt: Abstract 3D visualization of social networks breaking apart into isolated nodes, neon lines, dark background

scenes.text: Single-person households are the fastest-growing demographic in major cities worldwide.
scenes.bg_prompt: High-angle shot of a micro-apartment building exterior, glowing windows showing individuals alone, night time

scenes.text: This shift has transformed how we consume, eat, and spend our free time.
scenes.bg_prompt: A single tray of sushi on a table, soft lighting, focus on the solitary meal

scenes.text: Enter the Loneliness Economy: businesses that profit from our need for companionship.
scenes.bg_prompt: A futuristic storefront with digital signs advertising 'Rental Friends' and 'Digital Hugs', vaporwave aesthetic

scenes.text: Dating apps have turned romance into a gamified subscription model.
scenes.bg_prompt: Close-up of fingers swiping rapidly on a bright smartphone screen, colorful app interface

scenes.text: We are paying monthly fees just for the hope of a human connection.
scenes.bg_prompt: Stack of gold coins next to a holographic heart icon, glowing embers in the background

scenes.text: But apps are only the beginning of this trillion-dollar industry.
scenes.bg_prompt: A digital stock market chart showing a sharp upward trend, overlaid with human silhouettes

scenes.text: In Japan, you can now rent a family to fill an empty home.
scenes.bg_prompt: A group of actors sitting around a dinner table smiling, but the lighting feels artificial and staged

scenes.text: In the West, professional cuddling services provide a brief moment of warmth.
scenes.bg_prompt: Two people embracing in a soft-lit, cozy studio, focus on the hands, warm color palette

scenes.text: Human contact is being outsourced to the service sector.
scenes.bg_prompt: A robotic hand shaking a human hand, white clinical background, high contrast

scenes.text: Then there is the rise of the AI companion.
scenes.bg_prompt: A glowing blue AI avatar floating in a living room, futuristic and ethereal

scenes.text: Millions are now forming deep emotional bonds with chatbots.
scenes.bg_prompt: Close-up of a person smiling at a screen, text bubbles appearing rapidly with heart emojis

scenes.text: These algorithms are designed to never leave and always agree.
scenes.bg_prompt: Infinite lines of code morphing into a smiling human face, Matrix-style green lighting

scenes.text: The price of this isolation isn’t just emotional; it’s financial.
scenes.bg_prompt: A calculator screen showing a rising sum, reflected in a pair of glasses

scenes.text: The 'Loneliness Tax' refers to the extra costs of living alone.
scenes.bg_prompt: A split screen comparing a single grocery bag and a full family cart, price tags emphasized

scenes.text: Higher rent, utility bills, and food costs drain the savings of the isolated.
scenes.bg_prompt: Coins falling into a dark void, dramatic shadows, slow motion

warnings: ⚠️  Total duration 158s (2.6 min) is outside target range 10-12 min!
